who: law firm accountants processing 5–15 trust account transactions/month
offer: For law firm accountants processing 5–15 trust account transactions/month, manual reconciliation causes compliance risks. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of trust account transactions leading to compliance risks.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm accountants
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firm accountants with demo video
Community forums where accountants share tools
try_it: Let users try transaction logging and error reporting on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
